mechanism: 8-15% trade-weighted BEER overvaluation provides gravitational pull toward weakness, but the exorbitant privilege can delay mean-reversion for years. Overvaluation is a necessary but insufficient condition for cycle inflection.
regime_dependence: BEER mean-reversion has documented 1-5 year out-of-sample predictive power but zero short-term predictive power. Overvaluation can persist or widen before reversing.
